text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergaß sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Prideaux</AUTHOR> <TITLE>A. und N. Testam, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>II. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Gr. LXX.</TITLE> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr. punctata</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bödickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"1. Fixed encoding artifacts (e.g., '√ü' to 'ß', '√∂' to 'ö', '√§' to 'ä'). 2. Corrected author 'Prideaun' to 'Prideaux' and moved to <AUTHOR> tag. 3. Corrected volume '1I.' to 'II.'. 4. Moved 'Cattenburg' from a faulty <PRIZE> tag in the first item to the <AUTHOR> tag of the second item where it belongs. 5. Corrected 'Bibl. 8r. 70.' to 'Bibl. Gr. LXX.' (referring to Reineccius' Septuagint). 6. Moved 'punctata' from <AUTHOR> to <TITLE> for the Hebrew Bible entry. 7. Normalized format indicators (e.g., '8v√≤' to '8.'). 8. Escaped ampersand in title."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>6. Bey Herrn Haag an der Augustinergaß sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Prideaux</AUTHOR> <TITLE>A. und N. Testam, in einer Connex. mit der Völcker-Historie</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE> <YEAR>1725</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>II. Tom. 1. Vol. 2</VOLUME></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Cattenburg</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Sapientia Mos. de Vita & Scriptis Mosis contra Deistas</TITLE>. <PLACE>Amst.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>4.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Gr. LXX.</TITLE> <AUTHOR>Interpp. Reineccii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Bibl. Hebr. punctata</TITLE> von <AUTHOR>Leusdenii</AUTHOR>, <PLACE>Frf.</PLACE> <YEAR>1694</YEAR>. <FORMAT>12.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Seldenus</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Diis Syris</TITLE>. <PLACE>Lips.</PLACE> <YEAR>1692</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Gottschedens</AUTHOR> <TITLE>critische Dichtkunst</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipzig</PLACE> <YEAR>1737</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bödickers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Grundsätze der Deutschen Sprach</TITLE>, <PLACE>Berlin</PLACE>, <YEAR>1729</YEAR>. <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed encoding artifacts (e.g., '√ü' to 'ß', '√∂' to 'ö', '√§' to 'ä'). 2. Corrected author 'Prideaun' to 'Prideaux' and moved to <AUTHOR> tag. 3. Corrected volume '1I.' to 'II.'. 4. Moved 'Cattenburg' from a faulty <PRIZE> tag in the first item to the <AUTHOR> tag of the second item where it belongs. 5. Corrected 'Bibl. 8r. 70.' to 'Bibl. Gr. LXX.' (referring to Reineccius' Septuagint). 6. Moved 'punctata' from <AUTHOR> to <TITLE> for the Hebrew Bible entry. 7. Normalized format indicators (e.g., '8v√≤' to '8.'). 8. Escaped ampersand in title.
